---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability, stage enhancement, or engineering improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

A clear, concise description of the proposed feature.

## Motivation

Why is this useful? What problem does it solve or what gap does it fill?

## Proposed implementation

How would you implement this? (optional, but helpful)

If this is a methodology change, please use the **Methodology question** template instead.

## Category

- [ ] Data ingestion (Stages 01–04)
- [ ] Bias correction / filtering (Stage 05)
- [ ] Climatology / event catalog (Stages 06–08)
- [ ] EVT fitting / smoothing (Stages 09–11)
- [ ] Masking / topography (Stage 12)
- [ ] Stochastic simulation (Stage 13)
- [ ] Vulnerability / outputs (Stages 14–15)
- [ ] Pipeline runner / tooling
- [ ] Testing
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Engineering hygiene (logging, CI, containerization, etc.)

## Scope

- [ ] This fits within v2.1 hardening (no methodology change)
- [ ] This is a methodology change requiring a version bump
- [ ] This is a v3.0 redesign feature (out of scope for v2.1)

## Additional context

Any other context, references, or screenshots.
